wiki.summary: MURDER EVERY 1 U KNOW is the 5th song on femtanyl’s 2023 EP “CHASER”. This track features artist Takihasdied, who has collaborated with femtanyl in the past on “LOVESICK, CANNIBAL!” Read more on Last.fm.
